summary.en: HORDI recommendation for radish (Raphanus sativus L.). Varieties: Japanese Ball (40–50 t/ha), Beeralu Rabu (20–30 t/ha). Grows in all agro-ecological regions. Well-drained soil, pH 6.0–7.5. Spacing 25–30 × 10 cm on raised beds; seed rate 5 kg/ha. Two-stage fertilizer: heavy basal (125 Urea + 200 TSP + 75 MOP) then one top-dressing at 3 weeks. Fast-turnover crop — don't delay harvest or quality drops sharply.
summary.si: රාබු (Raphanus sativus L.) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය. ප්‍රභේද: Japanese Ball (40-50 t/ha), බීරාලු රාබු (20-30 t/ha). සියලු කෘෂි-පරිසර කලාපවල වැඩේ. පස් pH 6.0-7.5. පරතරය 25-30 × 10 cm; බීජ මාත්‍රාව 5 kg/ha. අස්වැන්න ටොන් 40-50/හෙ (ජපන්); ටොන් 20-30/හෙ (බීරාලු).
summary.ta: முள்ளங்கி (Raphanus sativus L.) பயிர்ச்செய்கைக்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. வகைகள்: Japanese Ball (40-50 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்), Beeralu Rabu (20-30 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்). அனைத்து வேளாண்-சூழல் வலயங்களிலும் வளரும். மண் pH 6.0-7.5. இடைவெளி 25-30 × 10 cm; விதை அளவு 5 kg/ha. மகசூல் 40-50 டன்/ஹெக்டேர் (ஜப்பானிஸ் பால்); 20-30 டன்/ஹெக்டேர் (பீராலு).

field_provenance.notes: Yield range spans Beeralu Rabu (20-30 t/ha ≈ 8,000–12,000 kg/acre) to Japanese Ball (40-50 t/ha ≈ 16,000–20,000 kg/acre).

body.en: Well-drained soil at pH 6.0–7.5. Prepare raised beds to enable proper root development.
Direct seed on raised beds at 25–30 cm between rows × 10 cm within row. Seed rate 5 kg/ha.
Harvest at maturity — pulling early gives soft roots; delaying sharply reduces eating quality. Yield 40–50 t/ha for Japanese Ball, 20–30 t/ha for Beeralu Rabu.

notes.en: For severe leaf-eating caterpillar damage, apply DOA-recommended insecticides. Monitor weekly; threshold at 10% leaf damage.
Club root (Plasmodiophora brassicae). Apply lime to raise soil pH above 7.0; uproot and burn infected plants. Rotate with non-brassicas 3+ years.
